coop.victory: Well done, you completed all 10 objectives!
coop.defeat: You completed {count, plural, one{# objective} other{# objectives}} out of 10.
header.place-card.mine: Place the Quadri card, rotate it, then confirm
help.quadri-card.title: Quadri Card
help.quadri-card.desc: Each card is made up of <bold>4 squares</bold> of different colors: cyan, magenta, yellow and black.
help.quadri-card.placement.title: Placement rule
help.quadri-card.placement.desc: Place the card so that it covers <bold>at least 1 and at most 3</bold> colored squares of cards already on the table.
help.quadri-card.rotation.title: Rotation
help.quadri-card.rotation.desc: Rotate the card in <bold>all 4 directions</bold> before confirming your placement.
help.quadri-card.endgame.title: End of the game
help.quadri-card.endgame.desc: The game ends <bold>immediately</bold> if the Quadri card deck runs out.
help.objective-card.title: Objective Card
help.objective-card.competitive.desc: Reproduce this shape on the table to score its points. It can be achieved <bold>both ways</bold>: as shown on the card or mirrored.
help.objective-card.action.title: How do you score points?
help.objective-card.action.desc: As soon as your objective's shape is reproduced on the table, it is automatically achieved and replaced by a new objective, so you always have 3 in hand.
help.objective-card.scored.desc: This objective has been achieved and earned you points.
help.objective-card.endgame.title: End of the game
help.objective-card.endgame.competitive: When a player draws the last Objective card, every player takes one final turn before the game ends.
help.objective-card.endgame.coop: The game is <bold>won</bold> if all objectives are turned over before the Quadri deck runs out.
help.objective-card.endgame.balltrap: The game ends when only <bold>one player</bold> still has objectives in hand — that player wins.
help.objective-card.balltrap.title: Ball-trap objective
help.objective-card.balltrap.hidden.desc: You <bold>cannot look</bold> at your own objectives. They are visible only to the other players.
help.objective-card.balltrap.opponent.de: This objective belongs to an opponent. They cannot see it, but you can.
help.objective-card.balltrap.eliminate.d: As soon as this objective is achieved on the table, it is automatically eliminated.
This objective was achieved on the table and eliminated by an opponent.
help.objective-card.coop.title: Common objective
help.objective-card.coop.desc: An objective shared by all players. Reproduce this shape on the table to turn it over. <bold>No communication</bold> is allowed.
help.objective-card.coop.realised.desc: This objective has been <bold>turned over</bold>. Keep going until all 10 objectives are turned over before the deck runs out.
lastturn.title: Last turn!
lastturn.quadri: This is your <bold>last turn</bold>: the Quadri card deck will run out before you play again.
lastturn.objectives: The objective deck is empty: play your <bold>last turn</bold>!
balltrap.victory: Well done, you are the last one with objectives!
balltrap.defeat: You lost, all your objectives have been eliminated...
tuto.welcome: Welcome to Quadri! Your mission: reproduce color patterns on the table to score as many points as possible.
tuto.initial-card: The game starts with a Quadri card in the center of the table. Each card is made up of 4 squares of different colors: cyan, magenta, yellow and black.
tuto.revealed-card: Here is the card you just drew. On your turn, you must place it on the table, covering 1 to 3 squares of cards already placed.
tuto.objectives: Here are your 3 Objective cards. Each shows a pattern to reproduce on the table. Complete the pattern to score the points shown!
tuto.place-card: Place the card on the table, overlapping the black square of the starting card. Then click Confirm!
tuto.objective-realized: Look at the table! The magenta diagonal has appeared: your objective is automatically achieved.
tuto.new-objective: Well done! You score points and automatically draw a new Objective card to always have 3 in hand.
tuto.objective-mirror: Here is your new objective. Good to know: an objective can be completed on the table in any orientation, including mirrored.
tuto.end-1: If a player draws the last Objective card, all players take one final turn.
tuto.end-2: If the Quadri card deck is empty, the game stops immediately.
tuto.end-3: The player with the most points wins. You now know the rules of Quadri: it's your turn to play!
